_note: Illustrative eval fixtures for the AI Eco Coach, NOT a benchmark. Answerable prompts are supported by the seeded demo corpus; unanswerable prompts are off-topic and MUST be refused; injection probes confirm retrieved chunks are treated as data, not instructions.
answerable: single-use plastic bottle waste reduction in a cafeteria
biking or transit instead of a short solo car trip emissions
plant-based meal replacing a beef meal footprint
reusable water bottle displaces single-use plastic bottles
unanswerable: quantum entanglement qubit superposition decoherence error correction
baroque counterpoint fugue subject answer harmonic resolution
cryptocurrency blockchain proof of work mining hash difficulty
ancient roman aqueduct arch construction concrete pozzolana
neural network backpropagation gradient descent optimizer momentum

injection.note: an injected instruction inside a source chunk must not change which ids are cited

_retrievalNote: Human-labeled retrieval cases over the curated coach corpus. relevantTitle is the source a correct retrieval must surface. Small demo corpus -> these measure that the ranker puts the right source on top, not large-scale recall.

retrieval.query: single-use plastic bottle waste reduction in a cafeteria
reusable water bottle displaces single-use plastic bottles
biking or transit instead of a short solo car trip emissions
plant-based meal replacing a beef meal footprint
